When cash is PAID in MASTER LEDGER - dont display CALL STATUS for the paid invoices, only display REMARK which is added in PAYMENT DESK.

if any field in excel is marked as 0 or no data is present there, mark it as 0 in dashboard too

today collected day wise data 

also in the invoices data, dates imported are messed up - fix it plz

also make sure txt in x axis and y axis in a graph are visible on black bg too.

let users also search for invoices in payment desk tab too.

also add option for dashboard users like filter option in excel.

let dashboard users generate:
tracking invoice aging excel report
vendor payment trends excel report

DSO Tracker: Calculate and display the Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) metric dynamically to help businesses track average collection efficiency.

Color Scale: Use subtle color coding (e.g., green for current, light orange for 31-60 days, and deep red for 90+ days) to immediately draw an agent's eye to high-risk buckets.

Zero-State Guidance: When no file is uploaded yet, display a brief 3-step visual instruction block (or sample template download button) showing users exactly how to pull the required CSV/Excel ledger format from Tally.

Collection Effectiveness Index (CEI): Measures how much of the available debt you actually collected during a specific window. Aim for above 80%.

Average Days Delinquent (ADD): Shows how many days overdue your average customer is past their actual payment due date.

90+ Days Delinquency Ratio: The percentage of your total outstanding debt locked in the highest-risk aging bucket.

Bad Debt Probability Score: A predictive metric assigning weighted risk to buckets (e.g., 1% risk for 0–30 days, 50% risk for 90+ days) to estimate actual cash at risk.




also above footer add a guide: how this dashboard works and what ar recivables with some tips and tricks to use, using this dashboard to save cash flow of ur company.

i mean the output (export) excel file should also have similar structure as we have the file in input.
